systems: 馬來伊斯蘭占星（十二星）

features.desc_zh: 在同一介面中切換中國、西洋、印度、阿拉伯、瑪雅等全球 {total_systems} 種占星體系
features.desc_en: Switch between {total_systems} global astrology traditions — Chinese, Western, Indian, Arabic, Mayan and more — all in a single interface

features.desc_zh: 使用瑞士星曆表 (Swiss Ephemeris) pyswisseph 進行高精度天文運算
features.desc_en: High-precision astronomical calculations powered by Swiss Ephemeris (pyswisseph)

features.desc_zh: 整合 Cerebras / OpenAI，提供專業命理解讀，支援中英雙語互動問答
features.desc_en: Integrated with Cerebras / OpenAI for professional chart readings with bilingual Q&A

features.desc_zh: 純 SVG 渲染，清晰美觀，支援響應式設計，手機平板完美顯示
features.desc_en: Pure SVG rendering — crisp, responsive, and perfect on mobile and tablet

features.desc_zh: 繁體中文、簡體中文、English 即時切換，無需重新載入
features.desc_en: Switch instantly between Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, and English — no reload required

features.desc_zh: MIT License，永久免費，無任何隱藏費用，歡迎 Fork 與貢獻
features.desc_en: MIT License — free forever, no hidden fees. Fork and contribute welcome

hero.badge_zh: 線上免費使用 · Open Source · MIT License
hero.badge_en: Free Online · Open Source · MIT License
hero.desc_zh:
從七政四餘到西洋占星、從紫微斗數到印度 Jyotish、
從三式（六壬、太乙、奇門）到 Astrocartography、凱爾特樹木曆、太玄數占星、
紅皮書 Lal Kitab、薩珊波斯占星、皇極經世（Huangji Jingshi）、馬來伊斯蘭占星（Bintang Duabelas）、馬來七星五刻占卜（Kinketika）、柏柏爾占星、衣索比亞 Bahre Hasab、瑪雅曆法到巴比倫星表、世俗占星、拜占庭占星、醫學占星、傷寒鈐法、
傳統卜卦占星、運動占星（Sports Astrology）、擇日占星、蠢子數、亞美尼亞占星、地占占星、伊特魯里亞占星、煉金占星——堅占星將全球 {total_systems} 種占星體系融合為一，讓千年星學智慧觸手可及。
hero.desc_en:
From Seven Luminaries to Western Astrology, from Zi Wei Dou Shu to Indian Jyotish,
from San Shi (Liu Ren, Tai Yi, Qi Men) to Astrocartography, Celtic Tree Calendar, Tai Xuan Shu,
Lal Kitab, Sassanid Persian Astrology, Huangji Jingshi, Malay Islamic Astrology (Bintang Duabelas), Malay Time Divination (Kinketika), Berber Astrology, Ethiopian Bahre Hasab, Mayan Calendar to Babylonian Star Catalogue, Mundane Astrology, Byzantine Astrology, Medical Astrology, Shang Han Method,
Traditional Horary, Sports Astrology (Frawley), Electional Astrology, Chun Zi Shu, Armenian Astrology, Geomantic Astrology, Etruscan Astrology, Alchemical Astrology — KinAstro unifies {total_systems} astrology systems worldwide, bringing millennia of stellar wisdom to your fingertips.
